rows.label: qev041103_MSG0001
rows.name:
Excuse me, you there.
Have you seen anyone going around
selling Red Pollen Orbs to the Nopon-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0002
rows.name:
When you eat a Red Pollen Orb,
you get ridiculously energetic, but
afterwards, you become a massive slacker-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0003
rows.name:
In other words, you become a burden to the caravan-mo!
It's a huge nuisance-mo! I won't forgive it-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0004
rows.name:
Running around all over the place...
That guy... where did he go-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Excuse me, you there.
Have you happened to see a Nopon named Bodaboda
around here-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev041103_SEL0041
rows.name: Say you haven't seen him.

rows.label: qev041103_JNK0050
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev041103_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask for details about Bodaboda.

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0006
rows.name:
I see... thank you-mo.
If you see him, please let me know-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0007
rows.name:
He's a bothersome guy who's been
selling Red Pollen Orbs lately-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0008
rows.name:
When you eat a Red Pollen Orb, you get energetic, but
afterwards, the backlash makes you exhausted-mo!
It's a burden to the caravan-mo! A nuisance-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0009
rows.name:
If I don't catch him soon...
The Nopon lured by the words "instant energy" will
all become exhausted and useless-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev041103_SEL0061
rows.name: Say you don't know anything.

rows.label: qev041103_JNK0070
rows.name: Tell

rows.label: qev041103_SEL0071
rows.name:
Say Zazazan asked you to deliver
cargo to Bodaboda.

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0039
rows.name:
Momomo!?
I knew those guys were connected-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0011
rows.name:
And are you carrying that cargo-mo?
If you have it, I want you to show it to me-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_JNK0080
rows.name: Lie

rows.label: qev041103_SEL0081
rows.name: Lie that you don't have the cargo.

rows.label: qev041103_JNK0090
rows.name: Honest

rows.label: qev041103_SEL0091
rows.name: Honestly reveal you have the cargo.

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0012
rows.name:
...Did you already hand it over to Bodaboda-mo?
Momomo... I have to catch him before he sells it off...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0013
rows.name:
Momomo!? Let me see that cargo-mo!
If it's Red Pollen Orbs... that's solid evidence-mo!
I will definitely capture Bodaboda-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0014
rows.name:
This color... this shine...
I will analyze its composition-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0015
rows.name:
Red! Bright red-mo!
Eat it and hustle! And then become totally exhausted!
...It's the Red Pollen Orb-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0016
rows.name:
Thank you for your cooperation-mo.
With this as evidence, I can capture those guys-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0017
rows.name:
Well then, Roma will go
and catch Bodaboda before he runs away-mo!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0018
rows.name:
I did it-mo!
I managed to charge right in as those two met up-mo!
I caught them both together-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0019
rows.name:
You... betrayed me-mo!?
Whether it's Harvey or you,
you're all terrible people-mo! Fungo fungo-mo!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0020
rows.name:
This person is an ally of justice-mo.
The terrible ones are you guys
doing business with Red Pollen Orbs-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0021
rows.name:
I'll report this to the elder and make sure
you can never do business again, so be prepared-mo!
While I'm at it, I'll give you plenty of punishment too-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0022
rows.name:
Momo... you elder's lapdog...!
Gumomomomomo... mo... mo...!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0023
rows.name:
Please, just spare me from that-mo~!
If I can't make money,
there's no meaning to Bodaboda's life-mo~...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0040
rows.name:
...Weren't you actually receiving
the cargo from those guys after all-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0024
rows.name:
...Please-mo!
Roma just wants to protect the Nopon-mo!
If you know something... please tell me-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_JNK0100
rows.name: Lie

rows.label: qev041103_SEL0101
rows.name: Lie that you don't have the cargo.

rows.label: qev041103_JNK0110
rows.name: Honest

rows.label: qev041103_SEL0111
rows.name: Honestly reveal you have the cargo.

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0025
rows.name:
I see... thank you-mo.
If you see him, please let me know-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0026
rows.name:
...I knew it!
Roma's intuition was spot on-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0027
rows.name:
Let me see that cargo-mo!
If it's Red Pollen Orbs... that's solid evidence-mo!
I will definitely capture Bodaboda-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041103_MSG0032

and catch Bodaboda before he runs away-mo!![ST:wait ]

I caught them both together-mo![ST:wait ]
